reading.title: Reading: A typical morning
reading.passage: I wake up at six o'clock every day. I brush my teeth, then I take a shower. I get dressed and eat breakfast at home. I leave home at seven thirty and arrive at school at eight. My class starts at eight fifteen.

questions.question: The writer wakes up at seven o'clock.
The writer eats breakfast at home.
questions.explanation: "I get dressed and eat breakfast at home."

questions.question: What time does the class start?

reading.title: Reading: Housework at home
reading.passage: My mother cleans the house and washes the clothes on Saturday. She also cooks lunch and tidies the kitchen. My father waters the plants and repairs things around the house. My sister irons the clothes every weekend.

questions.question: The father irons the clothes.
questions.explanation: Sister ủi quần áo, không phải bố.
